architecture_rationale: Flutter mobile dev involves both exploratory tasks (UI debugging, widget tree inspection, hot-reload iteration) and structured deterministic flows (firebase deploy, build, test, pub get). Hybrid = ReAct planning for exploration + typed tool execution for known workflows.

high_risk.rationale: Each operation is irreversible or has blast radius. Single-action tools with explicit confirmation, rollback hint, and stop condition.

operations: widget tree search (grep for StatefulWidget, StatelessWidget)
common.rationale: Standard edit-read-search loops. One tool call per logical unit. Deterministic output shapes.

operations: flutter pub get + build_runner + analyze (cold start pipeline)
l10n arb generation across all locales
batch.rationale: Round-trip overhead dominates. Batch only when all steps are deterministic and failure at any step triggers full rollback.

schema.context_hint: optional: which phase this belongs to (build/test/deploy)

flutter_specific_extensions.widget_path: MaterialApp > Scaffold > Column > MyWidget (for UI debugging)
flutter_specific_extensions.platform_flag: android | ios | web | all (for platform-conditional logic)
flutter_specific_extensions.hot_reload_safe: true | false (whether change can hot-reload or needs restart)

observation_format.rationale: Standard 4-field observation from harness skill + Flutter-specific fields that reduce follow-up questions and enable smarter next_actions.

contract.root_cause_hint: Required. One-line diagnosis. E.g., 'MissingPluginException: firebase_auth not registered on iOS'
contract.safe_retry_instruction: Required. Idempotent action. E.g., 'Run flutter clean && flutter pub get && cd ios && pod install'
contract.stop_condition: Required. When to escalate. E.g., 'If pod install fails 2x, check Podfile.lock for version conflict'

flutter_error_categories.build_failure: Analyze build log -> check pubspec lock -> clean -> rebuild. Stop after 2 clean-rebuild cycles.
flutter_error_categories.runtime_crash: Check device logs (flutter logs) -> isolate widget -> add error boundary. Stop if crash is in native code.
flutter_error_categories.test_failure: Re-run single test verbose -> check golden diffs -> update goldens if intentional. Stop if >5 tests fail simultaneously.
flutter_error_categories.firebase_error: Check emulator status -> verify config files (google-services.json / GoogleService-Info.plist) -> check rules. Stop if auth token expired.
flutter_error_categories.platform_specific: Isolate to android/ios -> check native build (gradlew/xcodebuild) -> verify plugin compatibility. Stop if requires native SDK update.

error_recovery.rationale: Every error path includes root cause, retry, and stop condition per harness skill contract. Flutter-specific categories prevent generic 'try again' loops.

recommended_hooks.action: Warn before any firebase deploy. Require explicit confirmation. Show which project/environment is targeted.
Run dart format on saved file (async). Similar to existing ruff/prettier hook.
Auto-run flutter pub get after pubspec changes (async).
Verify signing config exists and environment matches (dev/staging/prod).
Auto-run flutter gen-l10n after l10n file changes (async).
Save session context to Obsidian vault (already configured).
Load Flutter project context: detect pubspec.yaml, check flutter doctor status, identify target platforms.

context_budgeting.system_prompt: Minimal. Flutter/Dart conventions loaded as skill on demand, not inlined.
context_budgeting.large_guidance: Move widget catalog, design system tokens, and API schemas to skill files. Reference by path.
context_budgeting.compact_strategy: Compact at phase boundaries: after build success, after test pass, after deploy. Preserve: current widget path, failing test names, firebase project ID.

anti_patterns_to_avoid: Overlapping tools: don't create separate 'flutter_test' and 'dart_test' tools. One 'run_tests' with platform param.
Opaque build output: always parse flutter build stderr into structured observation with root_cause_hint.
Context overload: don't inline full pubspec.lock. Reference it by path, read only when resolving dependency conflicts.
Catch-all 'flutter_command' tool: break into build/test/analyze/run with typed schemas.
Ignoring platform dimension: every tool output should indicate which platform(s) are affected.
